description: MemberShip seed data for Sunrise Yoga Studio. Apply via admin API after site is running.

settings.memberBenefits: Active members skip the $20 per-class drop-in fee. Just register for any class and your membership covers it.
settings.cancellationPolicy: Monthly: cancel anytime, no penalties. Annual: cancel after first 30 days, non-refundable.

notes: Configure Stripe Payment Links in the admin after connecting your Stripe account. Set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET in environment variables.
